case_title: EVANS SAKANI WAFULA VS. CHRISTOPHER COLLINS ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-12-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-24-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAFULA, EVANS SAKANI DBA E S CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT COLLINS, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-12-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-11-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-20-2019
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63548091)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-24-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-27-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
